narrative: Staff Machine Learning Engineer at Yellow.ai with nine years of product‑focused experience, bringing a solid blend of AI research and retrieval engineering. This depth aligns tightly with the Senior AI/ML Engineer role’s focus on search and retrieval. Experience level sits squarely in the 5‑9‑year band, though the candidate is based in Jaipur rather than Pune/Noida, and notice‑period details are unclear. The primary limitation is the geographic mismatch, which may affect immediate availability.
